failures.description: The agent failed by planning to search all Vacuum Cleaners instead of restricting the search to available Vacuum Cleaners, despite the user explicitly asking for the cheapest available item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to find the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner. The agent understood the broad goal, but at index 1 it created a plan_query with "available_only": false and explicitly described searching regardless of availability. The required constraint, availability, was already present in the user request. This deviates from the expected tool-call plan, which should filter for available items.
